title: Potentiometric Studies on the Complexes of Some Bivalent Metal Ions with N-[2-Hydroxy-1-naphthalidene]-cyclohexylamine
author: M. S. MAYADEO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Ramnarain Ruia College, Matunga, Bombay-400 019 

  Manuscript received 25 July 1983, accepted 3 May 1984  

 Potentiometric studies have been carried out on metal complexes or Cu II , Ni II ,   Co II , Cd II  with  N -[2-hydroxy-1-naphthalidene)-cyclohexylamine. The formation constants ( \(\mathcal{p}\) K 1  and  \(\mathcal{p}\) K 2 ) of the reagent and the dissociation constants of its metal complexes have been determined by Bjerrun method at 30 ± 0.1 o  and at ionic strength 0.1  M  in 3 : 1 (v/v) dioxane-water medium. The order of stability constants of the chelates is 
found to be Cn II  > Co II > Ni II  > Cd II .
